topic: Alpha Decay Chart — Phase B P1
summary: Built the Alpha Decay Chart feature end-to-end. Added alpha_decay.py (new module), tests/test_alpha_decay.py (30 tests, all passing), a new '📉 Alpha Decay' dashboard tab with Chart.js visualisation, and the /api/alpha_decay GET endpoint in bot.py.

alpha_decay.py.purpose: Compute per-trade forward return distributions at T+1, T+3, T+5, T+10 bars after entry
key_functions: fetch_forward_returns(symbol, entry_dt, horizons) — yfinance Ticker.history() per call, 3 retries
compute_alpha_decay(trades, horizons) — enriches closed trades with fwd returns + direction-adj returns
get_alpha_decay_stats(trades, horizons) — public API: groups by score band, regime, direction
alpha_decay.py.direction_normalisation: SHORT trades: raw return sign inverted so positive always = favourable outcome

tests/test_alpha_decay.py.coverage: date parsing edge cases, percentile math, aggregation with missing horizons, segment counts, custom horizons, file loading, SHORT sign inversion, open-trade skipping

changes: Added #view-alpha HTML: KPI strip (n, optimal hold, T+1, T+10), Chart.js line chart with P25–P75 band, segment breakdown table
switchTab('alpha') triggers chart destroy + reload with 50ms DOM layout delay
GET /api/alpha_decay — imports get_alpha_decay_stats(), returns JSON with error fallback

data_state.note: 52 backfilled trades lack signal_scores — forward returns computable but per-dimension IC not yet possible. T+10 results sparse for entries after 2026-03-19.
